version_description: Transcribed from the official version here https://youtu.be/zWd__w5UWVc no capo, thank you GTA V for letting me remember this song.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]

[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[ch]F7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]
Ain't no personal thing, boy[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But you've got to stay away[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Far, far away from my heart, my heart[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Don't you know what your kiss is doing[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Let me tell it to you from the start, boy[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
  Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  You make the knife feel good[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
  I'll fight you to the end, baby[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bbm[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]
You've been hanging around, boy[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
And you have started sinking in[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Whoa baby, you're way out of line now[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Unaware how this all got started[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Let me tell it you one more time, boy[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
  Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  You make the knife feel good[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
  I'll fight you to the end, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
  Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  You make the knife feel good[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]
  I'll fight you to the end[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
I learned something about myself[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]
Last night with you I knew[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbm[/ch]         [ch]Eb[/ch]
I didn't want nobody else[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
And you're scaring me to death now, baby[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]

[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
